THE OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM JUNE 12 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT JUNIORRANKSPORTS, INC.'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Set For Trial On Apr-02-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint; Memo Of P & A
Off Calendar Jun-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. SHARI MARKS OF FRANDZEL ROBINS BLOOM & CSATO, TEL. NO. (408)457-3696 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JUNIORRANKSPORTS, INC.'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint is Denied. The weight of the evidence supports the exercise of specific personal jurisdiction over Defendant. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =302/HK

Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint; Memo Of P & A

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JUNIORRANKSPORTS, INC.'S NOTICE OF MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT
is Continued to June 20, 2012 so that the court may receive courtesy copies of the opposition papers.
